extraction.one_line_summary: TEUNS Dylan won a two-up sprint after DUMOULIN Tom exploded the early break on the penultimate climb, forcing selection 17km out that isolated BARDET, PORTE, and MARTIN.
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN Tom tested Giro injury by forcing tempo on penultimate climb, deliberately splintering front group before eventual break formed.
PINOT Thibaut attacked 17km out creating nine-rider elite selection, revealing Tour de France recon aggression despite moderate form.
BARDET, PORTE, MARTIN caught in third group 24+ seconds back despite being in initial lead group, poor positioning cost podium.
FROOME Chris and POELS Wout both made selection, showing Sky protected two GC options within 17km despite fragmented race.
Final climb averaging 54km/h at end of 43km/h stage prevented regrouping, showing sustained tempo more decisive than single attack.

rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: out-sprinted MARTIN Guillaume from two-up break after being allowed into winning move 17km out
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: tested injured knee by forcing early selection on penultimate climb, looked sprightly before sitting up after work done
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: aggressive as promised with multiple attacks 17km out but lacked finish to contest win from selection he created
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: caught in third group 24 seconds down despite being in initial lead selection, critical positioning error before key move
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: missed decisive nine-rider selection and trapped in chase group, unusually poor positioning for GC contender
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: second place but lost 13 seconds in two-up sprint, also caught out initially before bridging back
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: bridged aggressively to Pinot selection and made all key moves despite limited 2019 racing
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: launched huge attack in winning selection, animated the move even without taking stage
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: made selection but appeared to lack legs on back of Froome's wheel in final climbs
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: made decisive nine-rider selection 17km out, positioning superior to fellow GC riders
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: present in winning selection but invisible, contrasts with Pinot's animation of same group
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: neutral: pushing pace early in yellow jersey group but dropped before decisive 17km selection
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: in early break but struggled and dropped on first major climb 11km in, unusually weak
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: negative: couldn't find form on terrain that should suit, samsic continues bad season
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: made elite selection alongside Froome, demonstrating Sky's dual-leader depth in fragmented race
